description: This API is the second release of N-1-1 contingency analysis solution. This API is used to perform N-1-1 contingency analysis. Each pair of N-1-1 contingencies is simulated in the way that the first N-1 contingency is simulated by a full AC load flow solution with the power flow options for the first N-1 contingency; the post solution of the first N-1 contingency is used as the base case for the second N-1 contingency, the second N-1 contingency is imposed and solved by a full AC load flow solution with power flow options for the second N-1 contingency. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.1.0. ierr = n11_accc_3(options,values,label,dfxfile,accfile,confile,inlfile,thrfile)

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: An array of sixteen elements specifying integer specifying power flow options. (input).

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: An array of one elements specifying a real. (input).

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Label of generation dispatch system, required if the dispatch mode of options(15) is not zero. the dispatch mode and the system provide for a default dispatch method for contingencies causing unbalance between load demand and generation. (input).

parameters.name: dfxfile
parameters.description: Name of the distribution factor data file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: accfile
parameters.description: Name of contingency analysis output file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: confile
parameters.description: Name of contingency description data file for the second n-1 contingencies. (input; blank for none).

parameters.name: inlfile
parameters.description: Name of unit inertia data file. (input; blank for none).

parameters.name: thrfile
parameters.description: Name of load throwover data file. (input; blank for none).

options.description: tap adjustment flag for the first N-1 contingency (tap adjustment option setting by default).
area interchange adjustment flag for the first N-1 contingency (area interchange adjustment option setting by default).
enable using tie line flows only in calculating area interchange.
enable using tie line flows and loads in calculating area interchange.
phase shift adjustment flag for the first N-1 contingency (phase shift adjustment option setting by default).
dc tap adjustment flag for the first N-1 contingency (dc tap adjustment option setting by default).
switched shunt adjustment flag for the first N-1 contingency (switched shunt adjustment option setting by default).
induction motor treatment flag for the first N-1 contingency (applied when an induction motor fails to solve due to low terminal bus voltage, 0, by default).
Optimized fixed slope decoupled Newton-Raphson method.
non-divergent solution flag (non-divergent solution option setting by default).
tap adjustment flag for the first N-1 contingency (tap adjustment option setting by default).
area interchange adjustment flag for the first N-1 contingency (area interchange adjustment option setting by default).
enable using tie line flows only in calculating area interchange.
enable using tie line flows and loads in calculating area interchange.
phase shift adjustment flag for the first N-1 contingency (phase shift adjustment option setting by default).
dc tap adjustment flag for the first N-1 contingency (dc tap adjustment option setting by default).
switched shunt adjustment flag for the first N-1 contingency (switched shunt adjustment option setting by default).
induction motor treatment flag for the first N-1 contingency (applied when an induction motor fails to solve due to low terminal bus voltage, 0, by default).
flag to skip the second N-1 contingencies if the first N-1 contingency is not clean.

error_codes.description: No error.
Invalid OPTIONS value.
Invalid VALUES value.
Generators are converted.
Buses in island(s) without a swing bus–use activity TREE.
Largest mismatch exceeds tolerance.
Generation subsystem not specified.
Too many islands in base case.
in-service induction machines are in the “stalled” or “tripped” state.
buses with bus type code and series element status inconsistencies.
No Distribution Factor Data input file specified.
No Contingency Analysis Output File specified.
Can not read the Contingency Description Data File for the second N-1 contingencies.
No second N-1 contingencies are specified.
Invalid base/contingency case flag combination.
File is not in the form of a PSSE-25 or later DFAX file–run DFAX.
Monitored elements exceed limit when adding multi-section line members.
Error opening distribution factor data file.
Error opening load throwover data file.
Error opening inertia data file.
Prerequisite requirements for function not met.
